title: Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs * Disaster/Emergency Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs * Disaster/Emergency Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Disaster/Emergency Issues Women Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GLIDE REVITALIZATION DONATIONS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts small donations of shelf-stable food, pet food, clothing, small appliances, compact furniture, and household goods. Cannot accept large appliances or big furniture. Supports individuals and families impacted by the March 2025 floods in Douglas County. 301 Glide Loop Drive Glide, OR 97443 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Email (541) 671-0189 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GLIDE REVITALIZATION DONATIONS PROGRAM
